# BP-131 positive: database/sql Query is used for a DML statement with no returned rows.
lang: go
file: BP-131-vulnerable.go
variant: database-sql
---
package sample

import "database/sql"

func archive(db *sql.DB, id int) error {
	_, err := db.Query("UPDATE accounts SET archived = TRUE WHERE id = ?", id)
	return err
}
